title: No Despite To The Dead.
content:
Reproach we may the living, not the dead:
    'Tis cowardice to bite the buried.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "No Despite To The Dead.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
